summary:
DIVINE MANIFESTATIONS AND DEFLECTING GLORY: Brandon shares prophetic insights regarding upcoming spiritual signs and wonders, emphasizing that believers must first intercede in the spiritual realm. He recounts a vision from God where people's cars will appear to be on literal fire as they drive and intercede, serving as a supernatural sign reminiscent of the Azusa Street revival and Rodney Howard-Browne's meetings in Fort Worth, Texas. Brandon stresses that God will perform unprecedented miracles, but only through individuals who act as mirrors to deflect all the glory back to Jesus rather than seeking fame for themselves. He explains that carrying this endless treasure of the Holy Spirit in earthen vessels requires absolute humility, obedience, and stewardship, warning that God will not share His glory and will only elevate those who die to their own ego.

CRITIQUE OF MODERN CHURCH COMPROMISE: Brandon strictly warns against believers being unequally yoked in marriage and sharply criticizes seeker-friendly churches that rely on staging, packaging, and entertainment to attract crowds. Using Reinhard Bonnke's massive African crusades as a prime example, he argues that the sheer presence of God's glory is enough to attract millions without any artificial dressing. He notes that many once-vibrant spiritual institutions have become spiritually dead cesspools because they severed their connection to the true vine and embraced a compromising, lukewarm lifestyle. Brandon urgently cautions that those living with unrepentant or lukewarm behaviors will face perilous consequences, as a massive shaking is coming to separate true believers from the world.

PROPHETIC TIMELINES AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon details a series of visions mapping out future events, highlighting a coming paradigm shift and a massive wealth transfer expected to begin in the fall, specifically mentioning September and October. He sees an unkinking of a massive spiritual hose that will release a waterfall of financial blessings meant to fund the end-time harvest, not for personal hoarding. He anticipates a major revival centered in Branson, Missouri, tied to an annual October prayer conference. Looking further ahead, Brandon outlines significant accelerating changes, birthing pains, and economic shifts extending through 2026, 2027, and 2028, urging believers to press forward and not become complacent with the initial levels of wealth or relief they receive.

COMING PLAGUES AND GLOBAL CRISES: Brandon describes terrifying visions of upcoming global tribulations, including a devastating sickness that affects both millions of people and animals, specifically cattle and dogs, causing widespread death and empty streets. He foresees severe economic collapse characterized by the introduction of a digital dollar valued at fifty cents, long food lines, and empty store shelves, likening a previous pandemic to a mere trial run. His visions also include geopolitical escalations such as retaliation from China and Europe, a massive storm on the East Coast, the appearance of a dangerous space rock or asteroid, and Donald Trump crying over a podium under immense pressure. He notes specific locations experiencing this desolation, such as Edmond, Oklahoma, seeing empty stadiums and idle towns as the birth pains of the end times severely increase.

THE SUPREME COURT OF HEAVEN VISION: Brandon's wife Diana reads a profound prophetic vision from December 2018 detailing a spiritual trial in the Supreme Court of Heaven. In this vision, God the Father presides over twelve biblical judges, while Satan demands the legal right to take control of the earth for seven years of tribulation, arguing that Adam's lease has expired. Jesus Christ actively defends the end-time church, presenting a scroll written in His blood that proves the earthly bride's ongoing faithful intercession and requests a pause to secure a final global harvest of souls. Lady Justice eventually balances the heavy accumulated sins of mankind against the righteous prayers of the saints, and the divine court votes to grant a temporary window of grace and an extension of time, although God decrees that the severe earthly birthing pains and judgments will not cease during this reprieve.
rawData: [July 14, 2025]-[In prayer today the Lord gave me a glimpse into the next three years]-[https://youtu.be/GLZhDGRuMCY]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining us today. Well, it's Diana, my beautiful bride, and me. We're excited to be here today. I try to embarrass her as much as I can when she's sitting next to me. You don't know how many times we do these takes, and I try to be funny. I told her, "It's making her laugh." If you can't have fun doing what you're doing, then why do it, right? It's exciting times. This is what Jesus is talking to us about. Nothing is going to happen in the natural unless we pray it through in the spiritual first. We must intercede and pray for what's coming. He talked about it even today. I was driving around, and Diana had to go into the grocery store. The Lord started talking about cars, people driving around in their cars, and the cars looking like they were on fire when the glory was on them. He said, "Brandon, I'm going to do something very unusual." And I said, "Lord, what is that?" He said, "The fire was on buildings last time whenever Azusa Street happened. People saw fire on the buildings when Rodney Howard-Browne held meetings in Fort Worth, Texas. The building looked like it was on fire, and the fire department came, but the building was not on fire. It was on fire with the Holy Ghost, and they were seeing in the spirit realm a building that was on fire." The Lord told me, "Brandon, what I'm about to do is that when people are driving around on the streets, it's going to look like their car is on fire. I'm going to show up in their car as they're interceding, driving around the city, and your car is going to look like you're on fire. People are going to be staring, thinking your car is on fire, as a sign and a wonder in these last days—not just on buildings, but on you when you walk in like Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego. You're in a Holy Ghost fire. They were in an actual fire. But I'm talking about a real fire that they see on us. They will go, 'What is going on with that guy? He's on fire.' It's the glory. It's the glory." Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to anticipate the demonstrations and manifestations of the glory of God. Over the past 30 or 40 years, or whatever you've had in your life, the Lord has shown me, He said, "Brandon, it's been a cultivation with folks. Not everybody is going to walk in the greater supernatural miracles because they're not there yet. They'll try to take the glory for it. Do you understand? God will use you in an unusual way if you know how to deflect the glory to Him." The Lord told me, "If you don't take the glory, Brandon, I'll use you to do great and mighty things. As long as you always deflect it like a mirror, deflecting the glory to Him. You attract to deflect. As long as you deflect the glory in these last days, I'll use you mightily." "But there are many people who will not deflect it. They'll try to take it. And He said, 'I will not share my glory with any man.' For what I'm about to do in these last days, no one has ever seen what's about to happen. No eye has seen, no ear has heard, nor has it entered into the heart of man the things that God has prepared for those that love Him. Listen, ladies and gentlemen, God is about to show up and show off in your life in an unprecedented way that's going to be shock and awe. But He will not share His glory with what's about to take place. And if He can trust you to deflect it as a general, then He'll use you mightily." He showed me it's going to be like a change in command in the natural, like we have in the army. We have the generals, then it goes to lieutenant generals, and it keeps going down, right? The Lord showed me that it is just like that in the spirit realm. And the ones that pay the price and are willing to say, "I deflect. Father, it's not me. It's You." I just want everybody to know immediately when you're in a crowd and you're on fire with the glory, it's all about Jesus. This isn't about attracting attention to me. This isn't about how great I am. It's about how great He is. He's able to operate through this vessel. Ladies and gentlemen, I have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of Him and not of me. This is important. With what we're about to see—when we see the legs, the arms, the ears, and the dead being raised—we must remember we have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power will be known of Him and not of me. I decrease, He increases. As long as we have a heart where He is increasing and we are decreasing, we are deflecting and looking at Him. He is the potter, I am the clay. He is not sharing His glory with anyone. He could use anybody, but He's not sharing the glory. It's all about Him and nothing about me. I'm just a vessel that He uses in these end times. Do you understand? We attract to deflect, and it's very important. The Lord showed me today that as we are getting ready to see demonstrations and manifestations like we've never seen before, He said, "If you want to be a general in my army, know that I will not share my glory with anybody." People will say, "Well, look at him. He's on fire. Can you believe that? Did you know that Sister Diana has raised 30 people from the dead? Boy, she's something, isn't she?" She's a child of the King, and I'm a child of the King. We're all just doing exactly what He's called us to do, and He can use anybody. Keep your eyes on Him and stay focused. It's important that you do this. You need to hear me because of what He's told me is coming. Unusual signs and wonders beyond anybody's comprehension are about to take place in the body of Christ. Unusual demonstrations, unusual miracles, things we've never seen before. If God showed up with the glory on Moses's face, He said, "Brandon, I'm going to show up with even greater glory on you. Watch if you learn to deflect." Keep learning. Keep dying to self. That's why the Apostle Paul said, "I die daily." I will not take the glory. When the shadow of Peter walked down through wherever the people were sick, the glory touched them. He didn't even have to lay hands on them; the glory of the Lord touched these people, right? The shadow touched them. When the shadow touched them, it was the glory. It wasn't him; it was just a shadow. The glory was radiating out of him so strongly and so powerfully that even the shadow touched them. That's what the Lord showed me during my prayer time all day today, just driving around. He said, "Brandon, you must keep this in mind all the time. You have a treasure in an earthen vessel, that the excellency of the power will be known of Him and not of you." This treasure that you carry—He said, "You don't share your treasure until I tell you to share it. It's not your gift. It's my gift being distributed through you. The gold and the silver are mine. The cattle are mine. The anointing and the glory are mine." This endless treasure that you carry in earthen vessels is a treasure. The power of the Holy Spirit is a treasure in an earthen vessel. And He showed me a vast supply. And He said, "The supply will never run dry, Brandon. It will never run dry with anything that I've called you to do. There is a vast supply." Come to the river. Hallelujah. I feel the Holy Spirit right now. He showed me this treasure and all these coins, and He said, "Just because you have it and you operate in it, Brandon, doesn't mean it's for you to just do what you want to do with it." You are a steward of what I've called you to do. Listen, you are a steward of the money, of the wealth, of the glory. That's what I want to say. The vast supply, the treasure in earthen vessels. You have that treasure inside of you, ladies and gentlemen, and you're a steward of it. 'What do you want me to do with this, Lord?' And He said, 'You don't let everybody touch the treasure, and you don't tell everybody about it.' Because it's precious. The way you guard it and you protect it. And as you distribute it, you distribute the coins out—the treasure in earthen vessels—you distribute those out to the people that He tells you to. This is exactly what I've asked you to do today. Jesus said, 'I do nothing unless my Father instructs me to do it.' Even if He thought, 'Well, I'm the Son of God. Are you kidding me? I can do whatever I want to do. Are you kidding me? I'm Jesus.' No, He went about it even more humbled and dead to self. 'I do nothing unless I hear my Father tell me to do it,' regardless of what He thought or what He could have done. 'I only do what I'm instructed to by my Father.' And that's exactly how He operated the whole time He was walking underneath the glory, and that's what we should do. We have this treasure in earthen vessels, and it's coins. It's beautiful gold. It's beautiful diamonds. What do you do with that in distributing it out to the people? Only do what the Father tells you to do. I have a treasure, and in these scriptures that He gives me today, the excellency of the power will be known to Him. I attract to deflect, and I always make sure I'm never going to share the glory with the Lord. It's all about Him and nothing about me. Does that make sense? You have to keep this in your heart. He said, 'Those that do this, I will use even greater. They'll be ranked in the military in the spiritual realm.' Who will be used? He said, 'There's a lot of them I will not be able to trust because the moment of fame, the moment of clout, when they start getting huge on YouTube, huge on the news, or Daystar calls you up, or whoever—"Hey, my goodness, we heard you raised five people from the dead!" Well, of course, don't you know how much time I've spent fasting and praying? Don't you know how much I've done?' It's all about Jesus. I just need you to know this. This is what He's instructing me today. And it was very beautiful, but it was talking about how it was going to be in the days ahead, just right here in front of us. Glory to God. Hallelujah! I'm so thankful for a praying wife, that we seek Him together. I'm telling you, it is so important to pray and to seek Him together with your spouse, and that's why you don't hook yourself up with a dead horse. 'Well, I'm going to pray and get that person saved. I'm going to do this. I'm going to do that.' No. Do not marry and be unequally yoked with unbelievers. Find a believing believer if you're going to get married, or don't get married at all. You need to find a believing believer to get married to. I'm telling you, there's a lot of seeker-friendly... You're going to see people that think, 'Well, we have to change things on the stage. We have to change things because we're losing numbers. We have to keep relevant. We have to do these things.' And, 'We have to change our stage. We have to change our packaging because we're losing the people.' And the Lord told me, He said, 'Brandon, if you're standing in the middle of a field in a cow patty pasture, and you see poop all over the place, but people are gathered up... If I be lifted up, I'll draw all men unto me.' If the glory is there, I don't care if you're standing in waist-high mud, you're going to attract people like moths to a light, like these stupid flies flying around here trying to get around this light right now that I keep trying to kill. I'm telling you, if He be lifted up, regardless of what it is, what people are attracted to is not how pretty your stage is or how great your music is. It's the glory. It's the glory! I've seen it. Even when Reinhard Bonnke did his meetings and crusades in Africa, four or five million people showed up, right? But he had just a little tractor-trailer and this little stage with this backdrop, nothing really cool. But the presence of the Lord was there, and you don't have to dress up anything when the presence of the Lord is there. They're just coming to see somebody burn, to be on fire for Jesus. But a lot of people who are dead spiritually try to dress it up really pretty and put a bow on it and think it's the glory, and it's not. And you're going to see what was once alive in the body of Christ—before that was an oasis in the desert—become a cesspool because they've cut themselves off from the vine. They are no longer attached. And it's happening more and more and more, from what I hear. And you go, 'What happened? They were a place of refreshing.' They detached themselves, and now they try to decorate it and make it look pretty because it's work to get on the vine. It's work to die to self, and they don't want to do that. They go, 'Well, I don't want to do that.' Well, your flesh doesn't want to. 'Well, it's all right to sleep around. It's all right to drink. It's all right to party. It's all right to do all these things. We're not going to judge you.' Are you serious? We're going to walk in grace and mercy. I'm going to tell you this: you are either hot for Jesus or cold. If you're lukewarm, He'll spew you out of His mouth. And people who think they can live a compromising lifestyle and make it in the rapture, you have another thing coming. So many of you are going to be taken aback by what's about to take place. A great shaking to awaken is coming. You're not going to live like the world and be a purified bride that's going to come and go in the rapture. There were five that had their lamps full and five that didn't. Which one are you? So, that's what I had for you. I just want you to get on fire for Jesus and know what's about to take place as we see all these major signs, as we see all this stuff going on. I'm just in awe that we're right there. We're seeing the covenant with many. We're seeing it talked about. We're seeing all these things, the red heifer and all this stuff. And I'm like, 'Wow, folks, this is so cool.' I'm excited about the prayer conference in the fall. Sister Billye always holds her prayer conference in the fall in October in Branson. And the Lord keeps showing me Branson for the major revival. I kept seeing visions of Branson today, and the leaves are still on the trees. It was beautiful outside, and there was an anticipation for something amazing about to take place in Branson, Missouri. And then we have our prayer conference in Branson, Missouri, in October. We always do with Sister Billye. We go to that, and it's always such a blessing. It's one of my favorite things to do in October. I think it's like the 15th or something. So I always encourage people to come and help her be a part of a prayer meeting. You know, what are we expecting in these last days? Last year when we prayed, the Lord said, 'You've delayed the financial crisis for this four-year window—or it was a four-year, now three-year window.' And He said, 'You've delayed things that were coming to pass. Now you've delayed it because of the prayers of the righteous people interceding for America. You've delayed things. I'm giving you a window of time.' And that's what He said. And we saw the birthing pains of the major crash and all this stuff happening, but He said, 'I'm wanting to give you a window.' So, I pray this prayer time what we see in October of this year, if we're still here and the rapture didn't take place in September. Regardless, I'm always expecting, in September during Rosh Hashanah, for him to come. I'm going, 'Lord, the Feast of Trumpets, all the things that are happening.' So, we took communion before we started to pray. Diana and I have already communioned up. Yes. So, if you want to take communion, you can take communion where you're at right now, but we took it earlier. So, we're going to just jump right into the river and we're going to give God praise and glory right now and see if he has anything to show us. You know, sometimes he does, sometimes he doesn't when it comes to this stuff. Sometimes it's just about refreshing. Oh, the glory of your presence! We, your people, give you reverence. So arise from your rest and be blessed by our praise as we glory in your embrace. As your presence now fills this place, oh, the glory of your presence, we, your people, give you reverence. Oh, Father, I thank you for the fall. I see it. Everything is going to change like a paradigm shift come the fall. Watch. Watch the month of September. It's a time to remember. For September will be a time to remember. He's talking about... I see scales. I see scales that are balancing out. I see scales and things transferring. One's way down here and one's way up here. I see, and the scale is red. The scale is a red, fire-engine-truck red. And he said, 'Watch the scales be leveled, and they're going to flip today.' There's a time frame in the spirit realm that we've been waiting on as a body. You say, 'Why hasn't it happened yet? Why hasn't it manifested yet?' The time frame and the scale are about to flip like a paradigm shift. Watch the fall. Watch September. It's a time to remember. I feel led to describe this vision. I see a door. It looks like an old wooden door, but as you open this door and you cross through into this time frame, I see blue skies, beautiful white clouds, and all these sunflower-looking flowers all on these hills. And there's green grass, and there are beautiful yellow-looking flowers with green stems all on these fields, and then there's daisies and sunflowers. There are beautiful flowers crossing into this on these fields, and the hills are vast, like the Sound of Music hills when she's twirling on the green hills. You're just crossing forth into the door, and in time, I'll show you more. He said, 'I have looked forward to this time frame more than you have.' Don't bypass the summer to get to the fall. There are things that you cultivate to get into the fall—the beginning of the wealth transfer. Remember the Sooners. Remember these things. You're going to see a transfer of things. You're seeing a foundation being laid. Pray for the Congress. Pray for the judge. Pray for the loosing of the hose, for there was a kink tried to be put in the hose. But as you see as of this last week, a beginning of the kink being released. There is much more to this than meets the eye. He says an unkinking of the hose and a great flow. This is not a trickle, but a waterfall—a great, great flow, like a fire hose, a big hose. Not a little bitty garden hose, but a big hose. You're going to start to see a transfer. I see the apples on the trees. I see the ripening of the apples on the trees, even before the first frost. But frost happens differently in every single area, that's what he said. 'Where am I talking to you, Brennan?' That's what he's talking about. There's a changing of things. As you see the frost change, there's a changing of things. Well, usually around where we are, our first frost is in the end of October. Around that time frame, October, change starts to set in. Great relief. I feel the anointing on my ears. I'm seeing into November right now. I'm seeing into November and December. I see a rocket ship taking off. I see multiple things taking off. There's a change, a change, a change. And I see the sun coming up. I see the fall leaves changing. And that's just the beginning, even for 2026. I see... no, oh, I see '26. No, oh, more birthing pains. I see great pine trees, massive pine trees, for a great change is coming in 2026. Great change is yet to come. 2026 will try to be 'the year of fix.' They'll try to fix it. They're going to try to mess with it. You have great assignments ahead. You have great assignments of prayer ahead. They try to derail what's happening going into May. I see an acceleration in the world economy with the tariffs and things. Now I'm stuck right around July—I'm in July 2026. Don't become satisfied with the level of wealth that you get. Push on. Believe me for more. A lot of people will want to camp here. The enemy will try to derail it. What will you do to stand in the gap? Do you hear? Standing in the gap. Oh, there's much work to do. I'm seeing 2028 in bold. I see 2028. Fall of 2027. Oh, 2028. 2027. Oh, the rats. The rats. I see the rats. Oh, Jesus. Oh, my goodness. Oh, gosh. Oh, pray. Pray. Pray. Oh, my. Oh, Jesus. I see a snake. I see a coral snake. I see red, yellow, and black and white. I see our cattle again. I see our cattle, and they're sick. Rise up, church! Rise up, church! Oh, my goodness. Oh, my gosh. I'm going backwards now, and I'm coming out of the fall of 2027, going into the fall of 2026. You see birthing pains. You may say... And I'm going into 2028. I can see... No, the election. I'm around it. I can see. Oh, no. You have much to pray about. Oh, my goodness. Oh, the glorious church needs to... We arise out of this. We arise. We arise. Financial blessing is coming to. You must pay attention. You must hear his voice. I see an asteroid. I see a space rock. This thing is massive. Oh, many have the opportunity to go home early. These are the most serious times we've ever seen before. There'll be the best of times and the worst of times. There'll be the best of times, and there'll be the worst of times for the ones that are not staying close to the vine. Great shaking. The beginning of sorrows. We are in full swing—full swing in the sorrows. This is not a time to play church. This is not a time to play church in the days ahead. Sorrows: many will go home, I see. But you must remain on the vine. It's not a time to be playing church. You must remain on the vine. And you say, "What does that mean?" I'm talking about being lukewarm. You must be on fire; you must be in the glory for what's coming. Oh my goodness, I've seen into it. I've seen into the rats; it's like a flu. It's a bug. They're sick. The people, and I see the cows, and they're sick. I could see cows throwing up and being sick, and they're just falling down. Even your animals, your dogs. I can feel the atmosphere of what it feels like in that area. I can feel it. I can see people are not moving around. I see it in the streets. I see the church in Edmond, Oklahoma. I'm there on Second Street. I can see the tents again in the Sprouts parking lot and in the park. I can see the Methodist church on Second Street. I see yellow leaves in the trees. Much change. I can see that church. I'm driving in the car, and I can see going down. There's hardly anyone moving around on a very busy street. We're going eastbound. I see the storm on the East Coast. I see the storm again, like I've seen so many times. I see the white doves again. I see those white doves. I see the storm trying. They have a plan to derail these globalists, these people; they're evil. I see Trump praying. He's crying. He looks very defeated. He's standing there, and I see him. I see Trump, and he's praying. He's crying. He's praying and he's crying. The pressure—I see the pressure. And I see a red carpet. I see gold and red carpet, like fringe. And I see this red carpet. And it's like he's on one knee, leaning over this podium, crying, like he's praying. I actually—it's like I went there. The vision's so clear. There's no football there. There are no stadiums full of people; they're empty. I see empty stadiums everywhere. I can see all of them. It's to control things. It's like an act of war, a retaliation of things. I see China and Europe; I see China boldly. Remember Red Dawn. The Lord says, "Remember Red Dawn. Remember, a retaliation for their economy, a retaliation for these things." There are things coming. COVID was a trial run. Now I see food lines again because of what's going on with the factories and the stores, trying to shrink the economy again. I see the digital dollar. I'm there at the Target store, and I see lines of people going down. I see Lowe's and the Target store on Second Street again. And I see the people, and they're lined up by Lowe's, clear going down off of the road there on Second Street in Edmond. I can see the people again. I'm at the Sonic, and I see the line of people again. I see the digital dollar. I see fifty cents on the dollar. I see the crumbling of things because of this. Oh, Diana, I don't want to look into it. She gives us a window. What is the window? People say, "What is the window?" It's an opportunity to win the lost. You're running out of time. "Can we lessen this, Lord? Can we lessen and stop it altogether? Can we stop it, Father? Can we stop all this?" People are mistaking what He's talking about. The window: "I'm giving you a window." Everybody thinks, "Oh, it's just heaven on earth, everything's going to be good." No, that's not what He's saying. "I'm giving you a window of opportunity." Things are about to take a 180. Everything's going to change. A paradigm shift. Everything's changing. He's given us this window, a reprieve. What will you do with it? Birthing pains are still happening. Labor pains are not stopping. You think, "Well, this window of opportunity, what is this that He's talking about?" You must look deeper. He says birthing pains are not stopping: "I'm giving you a window to bring in a harvest, but all the labor pains and all these things are still taking place. I'm buying time." He said, "Go back to Maurice's word. The labor pains—I'm giving you an extension of time, but the labor pains will not decrease; they will still increase." Remember what he said. I'm hearing that word: "These things will not decrease. They will increase, but I've given you a time for a harvest." Brandon, go back to Maurice's word. What was in the courtroom of heaven? I'm there in the courtroom of heaven and I hear the sound of the gavel. Judgment has been set. Time as we know it is not going to be, but He's given us a window into the next Shemitah cycle. What will you do with this window? Thus saith the Lord. But the labor pains are going to come on quicker, faster, and more abruptly. Do you understand? Don't listen to the words around you—these people saying everything is peace and safety. All these false words. I'm telling you where we are. God is giving us a window. But you say, "What is this about?" Time as you know it is not going to exist. We're getting ready to step into the great tribulation. And that's what He's talking about: He's given us a window, this little sliver of time. "I can do a lot with that sliver of time for the glorious church." Do you see what He's saying? "I've given you a sliver." Adam's lease is coming up. These things are all falling in line like dominoes, as you see all this we're talking about with the UN. A great shaking to awaken. And all these people, I see them dying by the millions. I see them bent over with this virus—they're throwing up, very sick, and it's passing to animals. It's a plague. I saw China involved. I see Europe. I see rats on the ground. I see darkness. I see a very bad storm of the Antichrist agenda. The beginning of sorrows, sorrows going into tribulation. I see a window of opportunity for the church to rise up. What will you do with this? Will you put your head in the sand? And He said, "I've given you a window for a harvest." I'm giving you a window. Many false prophets are coming up. Many, many wolves in sheep's clothing. There's a lot of confusion in the church right now." He says, "You're going to see the labor pains increase. You're going to see all this. But with this financial blessing, Diana is going to read this prophetic word to you. You need to know where we are." Okay, so it was December 27th of 2018. I had an open vision prophetic experience as I was eating lunch recently. Suddenly, a portal opened in the spirit realm and my angel said to me, "You are summoned to come to the courtroom of heaven. You are to record the case being tried now so that God's people will know the lateness of the hour. You must warn them so that the bride may awaken and take heed. The time is short." I was escorted by two angels to a seat on the left side down front of the Supreme Courtroom. There were many hundreds of angels and saints already seated before the bench. I was surprised how much it looked like our Supreme Court room in America, except it was much larger. It looked more like a giant arena with thousands of seats ascending up as far as I could see. There were five big leather lawyer-like chairs with wings on each side in the front row. They reminded me very much of the kind of chairs my father always sat in behind his desk at his law firm years ago.
